title: Prioritize Arrivals Over Departures When Allocating Slots
description: The system shall allocate arrival slots before departure slots when there are competing requests for the same time period.
rationale: This requirement is necessary to ensure that landing aircraft receive preferential handling over departing ones, aligning with safety and operational priorities at an airport.
business_value: By prioritizing arrivals, the system will enhance the efficiency and safety of airport operations by ensuring that critical incoming flights are handled first, reducing delays and improving overall air traffic management.

source.description: As a airport slot coordinator I need to prioritize arrivals over departures when allocating slots So that landing aircraft receive preferential handling over departing ones

acceptance_criteria: Given multiple slot requests for the same time period
When the slot allocation is being processed
Then arrival slots are allocated before departure slots
postconditions: Arrival slots have been allocated before departure slots
functional_constraints: The system must enforce prioritization of arrivals over departures during slot allocation
edge_cases: What if there are equal number of arrival and departure requests for the same time period?
How should the system handle sudden surge in either arrivals or departures?

interfaces.name: Slot Allocation API
interfaces.description: Interface for the slot allocation process, where arrival slots are allocated before departure slots.

interfaces.name: Slot Request Database
interfaces.description: Stores information about all incoming and outgoing flight requests.

test_cases.description: Verify that arrival slots are allocated before departure slots when there are multiple requests for the same time period.
test_cases.expected_result: Arrival slots should be allocated first, followed by departure slots.

test_cases.description: Test system behavior with an equal number of arrival and departure requests during peak hours.
test_cases.expected_result: System should allocate arrival slots first, then departure slots if necessary.
